subcodes.first_line: O ye friends of God! Thank God ye that in such great century and luminous Era ye have stepped in the Universe of Existence
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای الهی شکر کنید خدا را که در چنین قرن عظیمی و عصر نورانی بعالم وجود
subcodes.subjects: @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization, @the mind's power of discovery, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @unity; oneness of humanity, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @thankfulness; gratitude, @love of God
